mapper.select: SELECT id, username, phone AS mobile, email, password_hash, CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS status, 'staff' AS account_type, status AS employment_status FROM staff_account WHERE LOWER(${column}) = LOWER(#{identifier}) LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, phone AS mobile, email, password_hash, CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS status, 'customer' AS account_type, status AS employment_status FROM customer_account WHERE LOWER(${column}) = LOWER(#{identifier}) LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, phone AS mobile, email, password_hash, CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS status, 'staff' AS account_type, status AS employment_status FROM staff_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, phone AS mobile, email, password_hash, CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS status, 'customer' AS account_type, status AS employment_status FROM customer_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT dr.code FROM domain_member dm JOIN domain_member_role dmr ON dmr.domain_member_id = dm.id JOIN domain_role dr ON dr.id = dmr.domain_role_id WHERE dm.staff_account_id = #{userId} AND dm.status = 'active' AND dm.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT DISTINCT pr.code FROM staff_account_platform_role sapr JOIN platform_role pr ON pr.id = sapr.platform_role_id WHERE sapr.staff_account_id = #{userId}
SELECT business_domain_id FROM domain_customer WHERE customer_account_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY business_domain_id
SELECT id FROM business_domain WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id

SELECT DISTINCT dm.business_domain_id FROM domain_member dm JOIN domain_member_role dmr ON dmr.domain_member_id = dm.id JOIN domain_role dr ON dr.id = dmr.domain_role_id WHERE dm.staff_account_id = #{userId} AND dm.status = 'active' AND dm.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dm.business_domain_id
mapper.update: UPDATE staff_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_changed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE customer_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_changed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
